---
applyTo: "src/**/*.tsx, src/**/*.css"
---

# Frontend Standards
- Use functional components with hooks
- Use CSS modules or Tailwind
- All interactive elements must be keyboard-navigable
- Follow WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility guidelines
- Use semantic HTML elements (nav, main, article, etc.)
- Ensure sufficient color contrast and never rely on color alone to convey meaning
- Support screen readers with appropriate ARIA attributes and alt text
- Use inclusive language and avoid assumptions about user abilities
- Design mobile-first with responsive layouts that work across all screen sizes
- Use relative units (rem, %, vw/vh) over fixed pixels for sizing
- Ensure touch targets are at least 44x44px on mobile
